channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: DOGE Caucus founding member debuts 2 bills to kick-start waste cuts in Trump term
item.description: Sen. James Lankford, R-Okla., is introducing two bills targeting pandemic-era fraud as part of his advocacy for government reform with the Senate's DOGE Caucus.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: After learning hard lessons in Austin, Greg Casar to take Congressional Progressive Caucus in new direction
item.description: The freshman congressman will lead the influential progressive caucus next year with plans to focus on working class and economic issues instead of culture wars.
item.dc:creator: Texas Tribune, By Matthew Choi, KPRC 2

item.title: Swing state governor's race gets curveball as top Dem runs independent, sparking calls for Buttigieg to enter
item.description: Democrats may be turning to former South Bend, Ind. Mayor Pete Buttigieg as a standard bearer in Michigan after Detroit Mayor Mike Duggan became an independent.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Virginia Gov. Youngkin calls for end to taxes on tips ahead of legislative session
item.description: Virginia Gov. Glenn Youngkin is calling on an end to taxes on tips ahead of the commonwealth's next legislative session, which could benefit more than 250,000 workers.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Two charged in connection with Iran-backed drone strike that killed 3 US troops in the Middle East
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — Two men, including a dual Iranian American citizen, have been charged with conspiring to export sensitive technology to Iran that was used in a drone attack in Jordan that killed three American troops early this year and injured dozens of other service members, the Justice Department s
item.dc:creator: STEVE LEBLANC, ERIC TUCKER and TARA COPP, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Judge rejects Trump’s bid to toss hush money conviction
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — A judge Monday refused to throw out President-elect Donald Trump’s hush money conviction because of the U.S. Supreme Court's recent ruling on presidential immunity. But the overall future of the historic case remains unclear. Manhattan Judge Juan M.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Schumer seeks legislation giving local officials authority to ‘swiftly’ respond to drone sightings
item.description: Sen. Chuck Schumer, a Democrat from New York, is seeking to have legislation passed that provides local officials greater authority to respond to possible drone sightings.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Senate Democrats push plan to abolish Electoral College
item.description: Three Democratic senators unveiled a constitutional amendment to abolish the Electoral College system Monday, just more than a month after President-elect Trump stunned the Democrats by sweeping all seven battleground states, knocking off three Senate Democratic incumbents in the process. Sens.
item.dc:creator: Alexander Bolton, NewsNation

item.title: Trump says it was 'stupid' for Biden to let Ukraine use US weapons to strike deeper into Russia
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump says he might reverse President Joe Biden’s decision to permit Ukrainian forces to use American long-range weapons to strike deeper into Russian territory.
item.dc:creator: Colleen Long And Aamer Madhani, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Fox News Politics: The DNC's Blue Christmas
item.description: Welcome to the Fox News Politics newsletter, featuring the latest updates on the Trump transition, exclusive interviews and more Fox News politics content.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Top Republican demands answers from Zuckerberg, accusing Meta of ‘shadow banning’ military content
item.description: Sen. Joni Ernst, R-Iowa, said in a letter to Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg that he needs to answer for purported "shadow banning" of military-related postings.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: A potential second withdrawal from Paris climate treaty under Trump could look different than first US exit
item.description: President-elect Trump is reportedly considering a second withdrawal from the Paris Climate Agreement, but it could look different than the first time around.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump says he will consider pardon for NYC Mayor Eric Adams, says he was targeted for illegal migrant stance
item.description: President-elect Trump said he would consider issuing a pardon for New York City Mayor Eric Adams amid corruption charges alleging he took bribes.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Lawmakers signal movement toward government funding deal
item.description: Top Republicans are signaling progress in government funding talks as leaders look to clinch a deal ahead of a looming Friday deadline. House Appropriations Chair Tom Cole (R-Okla.
item.dc:creator: Emily Brooks, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump says he doesn't expect DeSantis to name daughter-in-law Lara Trump as Rubio's Senate replacement
item.description: President-elect Trump says he doesn't think Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis will name his daughter-in-law Lara Trump to succeed Sen. Marco Rubio of Florida in the Senate.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump says he's a 'believer' in polio vaccine, and other news conference takeaways
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump has held a wide-ranging news conference in which he took questions from reporters for the first time since winning the election.
item.dc:creator: Michelle L. Price, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Biden establishes a national monument for Frances Perkins, the 1st female Cabinet secretary
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President Joe Biden on Monday established a national monument honoring the late FDR-era Labor Secretary Frances Perkins, the first woman to serve in a presidential Cabinet and a driving force behind Franklin D. Roosevelt's New Deal programs after the Great Depression.
item.dc:creator: CHRIS MEGERIAN, AAMER MADHANI and DARLENE SUPERVILLE, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Trump weighs in on NY mayor, vaccines and drones in freewheeling press conference at Mar-a-Lago
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump told reporters that he would consider pardoning embattled New York Mayor Eric Adams, said the country was “not going to lose” the polio vaccine and weighed in on the flurry of drone sightings over New Jersey during a freewheeling press conference Monday at his Mar-a-Lago
item.dc:creator: Colleen Long And Jill Colvin, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Former FBI informant will plead guilty to lying about phony bribery scheme involving the Bidens
item.description: A former FBI informant is set to plead guilty to lying about a phony bribery scheme involving President Joe Biden and his son, Hunter, that became central to a Republican impeachment inquiry in Congress.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: Trump girds for battle with Democrats, Supreme Court over birthright citizenship
item.description: President-elect Trump, Democratic lawmakers and the Supreme Court are on a collision course over restricting birthright citizenship, which Trump has identified as a top priority for his incoming administration.
item.dc:creator: Alexander Bolton, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Biden, Harris thank major Democratic donors and urge them to stay engaged after tough loss to Trump
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President Joe Biden and Vice President Kamala Harris on Sunday thanked deep-pocketed Democratic donors who raised record sums in last month's election loss to President-elect Donald Trump and urged them not to lose hope and to remain politically engaged.
item.dc:creator: MORIAH BALINGIT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Lawmakers struggle to reach deal to avert government shutdown
item.description: Congressional negotiators are struggling to reach a deal to keep the government's lights on past Dec. 20. Text of a continuing resolution (CR) for a government funding package was expected Sunday ahead of the looming shutdown deadline.
item.dc:creator: Aris Folley, NewsNation

item.title: The GOP stoked fears of noncitizens voting. Cases in Ohio show how rhetoric and reality diverge
item.description: AKRON, Ohio (AP) — Before the November presidential election, Ohio's secretary of state and attorney general announced investigations into potential voter fraud that included people suspected of casting ballots even though they were not U.S. citizens.
item.dc:creator: JULIE CARR SMYTH, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Pelosi 'on the mend' after hip replacement surgery in Germany
item.description: "Speaker Pelosi is enjoying the overwhelming outpouring of prayers and well wishes," Ian Krager said.
item.dc:creator: Steff Danielle Thomas, NewsNation

item.title: Trump's tariffs threat is dividing business owners across the country
item.description: Businesses are divided over Trump's plan to impose sweeping tariffs. Some companies welcome the protection from foreign competition, while others worry about rising costs and retaliation.
item.dc:creator: Scott Horsley, MPR News

item.title: ABC News to pay $15M in Trump defamation lawsuit
item.description: Court documents publicly filed on Saturday and obtained by NewsNation detailed the settlement's conditions.
item.dc:creator: Anna Kutz, NewsNation

item.title: Trump, close allies attend Army-Navy rivalry game
item.description: As national concerns about the drones spotted on the East Coast continue to mount, President-elect Trump is attending the Army-Navy game.
item.dc:creator: The Hill Staff, NewsNation

item.title: ACLU: Officials should enact law 'firewall' ahead of Trump 2nd term
item.description: ACLU leaders told press Wednesday that state and city governments should prepare for the implementation of ideas from Project 2025.
item.dc:creator: Anna Kutz, NewsNation

item.title: Mayor Adams seeks to deport migrants who commit crimes
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) – Mayor Eric Adams told President-elect Donald Trump’s border czar he would work with him to deport migrants who commit violent crimes in New York City. Adams met with Tom Homan at Gracie Mansion to discuss Trump’s plans for mass deportations.
item.dc:creator: Dan Mannarino, PIX 11

item.title: Nancy Pelosi hospitalized after she 'sustained an injury' on official trip to Luxembourg
item.description: Former House Speaker Nancy Pelosi has been hospitalized after she “sustained an injury” during an official engagement in Luxembourg, according to a spokesman.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: 5 things to know about Biden’s 1,500 clemencies, pardons
item.description: President Biden pardoned 39 people and commuted the sentences of nearly 1,500 others on Thursday, a sweeping move that comes after pressure from criminal justice advocates over the surprise pardon of his son Hunter Biden.
item.dc:creator: Julia Mueller, NewsNation

item.title: READ: Here is Biden's full list of clemencies
item.description: President Biden early Thursday announced that he is pardoning 39 people and commuting the sentences of nearly 1,500 others, setting a new daily record for clemency with a focus on those who were under home confinement during the COVID-19 pandemic.
item.dc:creator: Kyle Balluck, Fox 5

item.title: Minneapolis City Council overrides mayor’s veto of 2025 budget
item.description: The Minneapolis City Council enacted its 2025 budget on Thursday, after overturning a veto by Mayor Jacob Frey.
item.dc:creator: Estelle Timar-Wilcox, MPR News

item.title: Kimberly Guilfoyle is the latest Trump family ally chosen for an ambassadorship
item.description: Kimberly Guilfoyle, who got engaged to Trump's son in 2020, is the latest appointee he's chosen from his family tree. There's a long and controversial history of presidents picking relatives for jobs.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Treisman, MPR News

item.title: DFL, Republican senators weigh in on state budget forecast
item.description: The state’s latest economic forecast, revealed Dec. 4, predicts less revenue than expected and higher-than-expected costs for some government programs. MPR News host Emily Bright spoke with state Sens.
item.dc:creator: Emily Bright and Matthew Alvarez, MPR News

item.title: Florida state lawmaker files measure eliminating tuition aid for undocumented immigrants
item.description: Florida state Sen. Randy Fine (R) announced Monday he was introducing a bill to limit college tuition aid to undocumented immigrants.
item.dc:creator: Lexi Lonas Cochran, Fox 5

item.title: DA suggests judge could permanently halt Trump’s hush money case while upholding his conviction
item.description: Prosecutors are urging a judge not to throw out President-elect Donald Trump’s hush money criminal conviction but suggesting a willingness to end the case in a way that would preserve the verdict while avoiding a protracted legal fight.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News
